# GymSync Project Rules
- **Stack:** .NET 8 (Backend) & React Native Expo (Mobile).
- **Architecture:** Clean Architecture for Backend, Functional Components with Hooks for Mobile.
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS (NativeWind) for Mobile.
- **Communication:** Always use TypeScript.
- **Goal:** A gym management system with PT-Member-Admin roles and a session-based booking system.
